listeners.purpose: Discover every #[AsLogContext] / #[AsLogChannel] / #[RedactedForLogs] attribute across the codebase. Compile into LogContextRegistry indexed by declaring class.
Store workspace_id + workspace_id in RequestContext so AcademorixContextProcessor picks them up on subsequent Log:: calls.
Restore RequestContext from job payload (populated on dispatch). Ensures logs inside async jobs carry the originating workspace_id + causer_id.
